## MainScroll.useWindow property

If `true`<!-- -->, sets this scroll instance to the main of the application. Being the main scroll implies that features like restoring the scroll when the query changes, or storing the scroll position in the URL will be enabled for this container.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
useWindow: boolean;
```
